flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Missouri Southern State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.1k vs 4.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Missouri Southern State University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.8k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Missouri Southern State University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 3.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Missouri Southern State University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.8k → $17.1k).
